en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: ACCORDING TO DO NOT DESTROY. A MIKTAM OF DAVID, WHEN HE FLED FROM SAUL, IN THE CAVE. Be merciful to me, O God, be merciful to me, for in you my soul takes refuge; in the shadow of your wings I will take refuge, till the storms of destruction pass by.
zh: 神啊，求你恩待我！求你恩待我！ 因為我投靠你； 我要投靠在你翅膀的蔭下， 直到災害過去。

en: I cry out to God Most High, to God who fulfills his purpose for me.
zh: 我要向至高的 神呼求， 就是向為我成就他旨意的 神呼求。

en: He will send from heaven and save me; he will put to shame him who tramples on me. Selah God will send out his steadfast love and his faithfulness!
zh: 神從天上施恩拯救我， 斥責那踐踏我的人； 神必向我發出他的慈愛和信實。

en: My soul is in the midst of lions; I lie down amid fiery beasts- the children of man, whose teeth are spears and arrows, whose tongues are sharp swords.
zh: 我躺臥在獅子中間， 就是在那些想吞滅人的世人中間； 他們的牙齒是槍和箭， 他們的舌頭是快刀。

en: Be exalted, O God, above the heavens! Let your glory be over all the earth!
zh: 神啊！願你被尊崇，過於諸天； 願你的榮耀遍及全地。

en: They set a net for my steps; my soul was bowed down. They dug a pit in my way, but they have fallen into it themselves. Selah
zh: 他們為我的腳設下了網羅， 使我低頭屈服； 他們在我面前挖了坑， 自己反掉進坑中。

en: My heart is steadfast, O God, my heart is steadfast! I will sing and make melody!
zh: 神啊！我的心堅定，我的心堅定； 我要歌唱，我要頌讚。

en: Awake, my glory! Awake, O harp and lyre! I will awake the dawn!
zh: 我的靈 啊！你要醒過來。 琴和瑟啊！你們都要醒過來。 我也要喚醒黎明。

en: I will give thanks to you, O Lord, among the peoples; I will sing praises to you among the nations.
zh: 主啊！我要在萬民中稱謝你， 在萬族中歌頌你。

en: For your steadfast love is great to the heavens, your faithfulness to the clouds.
zh: 因為你的慈愛偉大，高及諸天， 你的信實上達雲霄。

en: Be exalted, O God, above the heavens! Let your glory be over all the earth!
zh: 神啊！願你被尊崇，過於諸天； 願你的榮耀遍及全地。 大衛的金詩，交給詩班長，調用“休要毀壞”。
